Workers Compensation Insurance

Stop Overpaying for Workers' Comp: Pay-As-You-Go is Here.

Pink Payroll connects your payroll directly to your insurance policy. No big deposits. No audit surprises. Just accurate, automatic coverage.

Request a Workers' Comp Quote Schedule a Payroll Consultation

Why Pay-As-You-Go?

Traditional workers' comp is a guessing game. You estimate your payroll, pay a massive deposit, and pray you don't get hit with a huge bill at the end of the year.

The Pink Way is different.

1

No Large Upfront Deposits

Stop tying up your cash. With Pay-As-You-Go, your premium is paid in small increments as payroll occurs. Improve your cash flow starting Day 1.

2

Premiums Based on Reality, Not Estimates

We calculate your premium using real-time payroll numbers from every pay period. Your policy stays 100% accurate, 100% of the time.

3

"Audit Headaches" Minimized

Audits are a fact of life, but they don't have to be a nightmare. Because Pink Payroll organizes your reporting automatically, we provide the documentation auditors need so you can get back to work.

How the Automatic Sync Works

  1. 1

    Payroll is Processed

    You run payroll through Pink Payroll as usual.

  2. 2

    Secure Reporting

    Totals are sent automatically to your carrier.

  3. 3

    Calculated Accuracy

    Premiums are based on actual wages paid.

  4. 4

    Automatic Payment

    The correct amount is paid. No checks to write.

Need a Quote? Get One in 24 Hours.

Through our sister company, Benefits Wheel Insurance, we offer a "Total Protection" package.

  • ✓ Fast Turnaround: Quotes usually delivered within 24 hours.
  • ✓ Expert Guidance: We ensure you are using the correct class codes (so you don't overpay).
  • ✓ Major Carriers: We work with AmTrust, The Hartford, Travelers, and more.
Request a Workers' Comp Quote

Solutions for Every Industry

From the high-risk demands of Construction and Manufacturing to the specific needs of Restaurants, Attorneys, and Retail, we understand your industry's specific compliance requirements.

Why California Businesses Choose Pink Payroll

Seamless Integration

Payroll and Insurance in one dashboard.

Cash Flow First

Keep your money in your business longer.

Local Support

A team that actually answers the phone when you have a question.

Protect Your Business Today

Don't wait for your next audit to wish you had switched.
